name: exec_command
description: Run one non-interactive shell command on the host from the Fennara daemon. Defaults to the active Godot project root as cwd. Shell commands use real filesystem paths, not res:// paths. Phase one has no PTY, no background sessions, no stdin, and no custom environment.

cwd.description: Optional working directory. Defaults to the active project root. Relative paths resolve under the project root. Absolute paths must stay inside the project root.

timeout_ms.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds. Fennara applies a reasonable default and a hard maximum.

shell.description: Optional explicit supported shell name or path: zsh, bash, sh, pwsh, powershell, or cmd. Unknown shells are rejected.

justification.description: Optional user-facing reason shown in approval UI when approval is required.
